About Me

Passionate. Purposeful. Persistent.

I am a dynamic student leader with a proven track record in organizational management, event coordination, and team leadership. Having served as Vice President of Public Relations & Networks (VPPNW) at ISTARC — the Ideal Science and Technology Aiming Research Council — I developed a deep expertise in building bridges between people, projects, and possibilities.

As a Pro-Terminator at Dreams on the Way, I honed my skills in program delivery, project completion, and driving initiatives to their fullest potential. My journey across management departments and multiple clubs has shaped me into a versatile, empathetic, and results-driven leader.

Leadership Public Relations Networking Event Management Team Building Strategic Planning Communication Project Management Problem Solving Research
🏛️
ISTARC — Vice President (VPPNW)
Led public relations and networking initiatives, representing the organization externally and fostering inter-organizational partnerships.
🌸
Dreams on the Way — Pro-Terminator
Executed and concluded high-impact programs from inception to completion, ensuring goals were met with excellence.
📚

Balancing academic excellence with an active extracurricular life — a true multitasker with a passion for growth.

Organizational Leadership · Former Role

Spearheaded public relations strategy for the Ideal Science and Technology Aiming Research Council.
